Get in touch
002 — Services

Two divisions.
One obsession.

Clean data, reproducible results, and answers that hold. We work in two modes — bespoke project consulting and general-purpose software — so we meet your data where it is.

Division 01 — Boring Projects

Bespoke consulting.
Tailored to your problem.

06 CAPABILITIES

Every project is different. We embed with your team, understand your data, define the problem clearly, and deliver reproducible outputs from start to finish — whatever the domain, whatever the scale.

01
Data Integration & Harmonization
We take heterogeneous, multi-source datasets and make them talk to each other. Normalization, batch correction, format standardization, and quality control — so every downstream analysis starts from a clean, structured foundation.
Data Cleaning Normalization QC Integration
02
Boring Pipelines™
Containerized, version-locked, reproducible workflows built for any data type and any scale. Every pipeline ships with a test suite, a lockfile, and a container — because reproducibility isn't optional when your results need to hold.
Nextflow Snakemake Docker CI/CD
03
Exploratory Data Analysis
We explore the unexplored corners of your dataset. Pattern discovery, anomaly detection, dimensionality reduction, and hypothesis generation — finding the signal your data is hiding before you commit to a direction.
EDA Dimensionality Reduction Clustering Visualization
04
Predictive Modeling & AI
Domain-agnostic machine learning for classification, regression, survival analysis, and generative modeling. We design, train, validate, and document models that generalize — not overfit — to your data.
Machine Learning Deep Learning Model Validation Interpretability
05
Data Platform Engineering
Scalable, secure infrastructure for storing, querying, and sharing your data. APIs, interactive dashboards, and system integrations — built to grow from a single lab to a multi-institution deployment without breaking.
APIs Dashboards Cloud FAIR
06
Research Consulting
End-to-end collaboration on data-intensive research projects. Study design, data strategy, analytical framework, and interpretation — tailored entirely to your domain, your question, and your constraints.
Study Design Data Strategy Analysis Publication Support
Division 02 — Boring Packages

General-purpose software.
Built to last.

We also build and maintain proprietary bioinformatics software tools — not tailored to a single project, but engineered for reproducibility at any scale. Containerized, version-locked, and tested on real data. These are the tools we use internally, made available for partners and collaborators.

Explore Boring Packages →
Start a Boring Project

Tell us your
data problem.

Whatever the domain, whatever the scale — we make it boring.

inquiries@boringscience.bio
Stop fighting your data. Start doing your science.
Boring Science LLC builds the infrastructure that turns biological noise into structured insight.
